productDisplayName: Forever New Women Stone Cream Jacket
description: CompositionCream frock coat with shell made of 100% cotton and lining made of 100% polyester with leapord print, with belted waist and sleeve hems, fabric covered buttons with metal rims and deep vents on the back FittingRegularWash care Dry clean only Cool iron on reverse if necessary Take feminine dressing to the next level with this peach frock coat from forever new. The frock coat gets a fresh look with the cream colour, leapord print lining, flared panels and deep vents on the back. Team this with dresses and ballerina flats for a really delicate look or wear it with a lace top, jeans and gold coloured flats for casual outings.Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
